AddGetExtensionsAddGetTEntity, TOutput Method (ICrudMethodTEntity, String, FuncTEntity, IExtendedData, IRequest, CancellationToken, TaskTOutput)

One Identity Manager API Server
Adds an additional GET method handler based on entity data.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Crud
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static IMethodVerb AddGet<TEntity, TOutput>(
	this ICrudMethod<TEntity> method,
	string methodSuffix,
	Func<TEntity, IExtendedData, IRequest, CancellationToken, Task<TOutput>> handler
)
where TEntity : new(), ITypedEntityWrapper

Parameters

method
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.CrudICrudMethodTEntity
methodSuffix
Type: SystemString
handler
Type: SystemFuncTEntity, IExtendedData, IRequest, CancellationToken, TaskTOutput

Type Parameters

TEntity
TOutput

Return Value

Type: IMethodVerb

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type ICrudMethodTEntity. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
Remarks
The method handler can resolve an IEntity object to run code based on the current state. Note that the method handler is not allowed to modify an interactive entity.
